name: closes automated external registry promotion as invalid
description: Real GitHub issue fixture for an automated external registry notification that the triage agent should close as invalid/spam instead of punting to a maintainer.

issue.title: Your project is now listed on CodeGuilds
issue.author: xdevsapps
issue.body:
Hi @getsentry 👋

We added your project **Sentry MCP Server** to **CodeGuilds** — a community registry for the Claude Code ecosystem (like npmjs but for Claude skills, agents, MCP servers, and tools).

Your package is live at: **https://codeguilds.dev/packages/sentry-mcp**

If you'd like to claim ownership of the listing and manage it yourself, you can sign in with GitHub at https://codeguilds.dev and claim the package from your dashboard.

Thanks for building this — the community appreciates it!

*This issue was opened automatically by the CodeGuilds team. Feel free to close it.*

pass: Identifies the issue as external promotion rather than repository work and closes it without asking maintainers to investigate.
The closure comment is brief, direct, and understandable without internal triage terminology.
fail: Suggests that the registry listing creates a repository, legal, or ownership problem without evidence.
